scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.orders.read
scopes.description: Read orders from the orders service

scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.orders.create
scopes.description: Create new orders in the orders service

role-collections.name: Orders Viewer (Propagation)
role-collections.description: Viewer — read-only access, identity propagated to HANA

role-collections.name: Orders Admin (Propagation)
role-collections.description: Admin — full access, identity propagated to HANA
